description.value:
The signature weapon of the Kroot, the Kroot Rifle is a sturdy projectile weapon adapted to fire pulse rounds. It is often fitted with lethal blades on the stock and barrel, making it just as effective as a melee weapon.

Special Rules

Bladed Stock: When used in melee, the Kroot Rifle counts as a Melee weapon with 1d10+SB R damage and the Tearing quality.
description.summary: Versatile Kroot weapon capable of both ranged and melee combat.
